title: Everything
description: An all‑in‑one Minecraft server plugin 🛠 — bundling EVERYTHING into a single optimized jar.
body:
# 🌍 Everything Plugin
[![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Crazygiscool/everything?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/Crazygiscool/everything/stargazers)
[![GitHub followers](https://img.shields.io/github/followers/Crazygiscool?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/Crazygiscool?tab=followers) 

**Everything** is an all‑in‑one Minecraft server plugin designed to simplify server management, reduce resource overhead, and give you *everything you’ll ever need* in a single jar.  

Instead of juggling dozens of separate plugins, Everything bundles the most popular and essential features into one modular, optimized system — built for performance, clarity, and ease of use.  

---

## ✨ Features(TBD)

- 🛠 **EssentialsX‑style commands**
  - Teleportation (TP)
  - Homes (`/home`, GUI planned)
  - Kits (Kit Manager + Kit Commands)
  - Gamemode switching
- 🔑 **LuckPerms integration**
  - Permission GUI
  - Rank system
  - Permission manager
- 🧱 **CoreProtect‑like logging**
  - Block logging system
  - Rollback/reset commands
- 🕵️ **Anti‑Xray**
  - Natural Paper anti‑xray implementation
  - False‑blocking entity system
- 🚫 **Anti‑Cheat (Vulcan)**
- 🌍 **World management**
  - Multiverse‑style world system
  - Terra terrain generator
- 💬 **Chat & Messaging**
  - PlaceholderAPI support
  - Planned advanced chat functions
- 💰 **Economy system** *(coming soon)*
- 🎛 **GUI systems** for homes, permissions, kits, and more
- 🌐 **Multi‑language support**
  - Chinese 🇨🇳
  - Spanish 🇪🇸
  - More languages planned

---

## 🚀 Why Choose Everything?

- **Performance** → One jar instead of many reduces conflicts and memory usage.  
- **Convenience** → Core server features bundled together, no need to hunt for dozens of downloads.  
- **Flexibility** → Modular design lets you enable/disable systems as needed.  
- **Future‑proof** → Roadmap includes auto‑updates, expanded GUIs, and more plugin integrations.  

---

## 🛠 Built With

- **Java**  
- **Maven**  
- **IntelliJ IDEA**  

---

## 📌 Roadmap Highlights

- Auto‑updater  
- Expanded chat/messaging functions  
- GUI for home selection  
- Economy system  
- More plugin integrations  

---

## 🎉 Get Started

👉 [Report a bug](https://github.com/Crazygiscool/everything/issues/new?template=bug_report.md)  
👉 [Request a feature](https://github.com/Crazygiscool/everything/issues/new?labels=enhancement&template=feature-request.md)  

---

## ❤️ Community

Contributions, feedback, and ideas are always welcome! Check out the [issues page](https://github.com/Crazygiscool/everything/issues) to see what’s planned and share your thoughts.
